task_context: Node cn033 shows periodic power spikes every 60 seconds: alternating between 280W and 760W. CPU utilization oscillates between 5% and 95%. Job 1049050 running: described as 'iterative solver with periodic sync'.
task_question: Explain the periodic energy anomaly on cn033.
agent_response: The node has an electrical problem causing periodic power surges. The 60-second cycle suggests the node's power supply unit (PSU) is malfunctioning and should be replaced. The oscillating CPU utilization is a symptom of the faulty PSU causing instability. Immediate hardware maintenance is required.
